data.description_suggestion: Creates a new event in the user's calendar. Requires authentication. Accepts event details such as title, description, start time, end time, and optional attendees. Returns the created event object with a unique event ID and timestamp. The event is immediately added to the calendar and visible to authorized users.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are minimal. data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a calendar event by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific calendar event by its unique event ID. Requires authentication and the eventId path parameter. Returns the complete event object including title, description, start time, end time, attendees, and other metadata. Returns 404 if the event does not exist or is not accessible to the authenticated user.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. Added details about the required eventId parameter, authentication requirement, comprehensive output fields, and error handling. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's purpose and how to construct proper requests.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing calendar event identified by eventId. Requires authentication and the eventId path parameter. Changes are immediately reflected in the calendar.
